title: Telegram Channel Scraper
description: Scrapes public Telegram channels for posts in the last N hours (default 24). No API keys required.

channels.title: Telegram Channels
channels.description: List of public Telegram channel usernames or URLs to monitor. Accepts formats: 'channelname', '@channelname', 'https://t.me/channelname'

hoursBack.title: Hours Back
hoursBack.description: How many hours back to monitor (default: 24 for daily monitoring)

maxPostsPerChannel.title: Max Posts Per Channel
maxPostsPerChannel.description: Maximum number of posts to collect per channel
